items.name: Swaying Flowers Dance
items.description: Sweep across the floor with the gentle grace of petals caught in a spring breeze. This elegant choreography embodies the tranquil beauty of a blossoming garden. Twirl softly to the rhythm and bring a moment of absolute peace to the server.

items.name: FuPanda
items.description:
In Chinese tradition, Panda's symbolize peace, luck, friendship, and unity.

Meet FuPanda! A chubby little Panda happily munching on his bamboo.
⚠️ WARNING: Do not grab or take it away from him… he won’t be happy!!
